---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new agent, command, or capability
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you proposing?

<!-- A new agent? A new slash command? A change to the protocol? Be specific. -->

## Which domain does it belong to?

- [ ] Engineering
- [ ] Product
- [ ] Business
- [ ] Data
- [ ] Writing
- [ ] Legal
- [ ] Ops
- [ ] Core (Conductor / Quality Reviewer / Synthesizer)
- [ ] Infrastructure (install, CI, protocol)

## What problem does it solve?

<!-- What task can't you do today that this would enable? -->

## What would it produce?

<!-- If proposing a new agent: what is the output? What format? What are the hard rules? -->
<!-- If proposing a command: what does it do? What arguments? What output? -->

## Have you read the existing agents in this domain?

<!-- Does your proposal overlap with an existing agent? How is it different? -->

## Draft AGENT.md (if proposing a new agent)

<!-- Optional but speeds up review. Follow the template in CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

```markdown
---
agent:
role:
token-budget:
---

# Title

## Identity

## Expertise

## Output format (≤ 1,200 tokens)

## Hard rules
```
